sql_array: CREATE TABLE rdf_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, subject VARCHAR(255), predicate VARCHAR(255), object VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO rdf_data (id, subject, predicate, object) VALUES (1, 'http://example.org/subject1', 'http://example.org/predicate', 'http://example.org/object1');
INSERT INTO rdf_data (id, subject, predicate, object) VALUES (2, NULL, 'http://example.org/predicate', 'http://example.org/object2');
INSERT INTO rdf_data (id, subject, predicate, object) VALUES (3, 'http://example.org/subject3', 'http://example.org/predicate', NULL);
INSERT INTO rdf_data (id, subject, predicate, object) VALUES (4, 'http://example.org/subject4', 'http://example.org/predicate', '  ');

CREATE PROCEDURE RDF_WITH_SPATIAL(in rdf_input VARCHAR) { DECLARE triples, ses any; DECLARE results varchar; result_names(results); DB.DBA.RDF_LOAD_RDFXML_MT(rdf_input, 'http://example.org/base/', 'http://example.org/graph/'); DELETE FROM rdf_data; SELECT id, DB.DBA.RDF_TRIPLES_TO_TTL(vector(vector(subject, predicate, object)), ses) INTO triples FROM rdf_data WHERE bif:st_within(subject, 'POLYGON((...))'); }
SELECT subject, COUNT(*) FROM rdf_data GROUP BY subject HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT subject, COALESCE(NULLIF(predicate, ''), 'default_predicate') AS clean_predicate FROM rdf_data WHERE object IS NOT NULL;
SELECT subject, MAX(object) FROM rdf_data WHERE object IS NOT NULL AND subject IS NOT NULL GROUP BY subject HAVING MAX(LENGTH(object)) > 10;
SELECT DISTINCT subject FROM rdf_data WHERE bif:st_within(subject, 'POLYGON((-10 -10, 10 -10, 10 10, -10 10, -10 -10))') ORDER BY subject ASC;
